page_content:
Prerequisite: GEOG272 and GEOG306; or permission of BSOS-Geography department.

Jointly offered with: GEOG617.

Credit Only Granted for: GEOG417 or GEOG617.

GEOG418 Field and Laboratory Techniques in Environmental Science (1-3 Credits)

Lecture and laboratory learning each week. A variable credit course

that introduces field and laboratory analyses in environmental science. Individual learning contract are developed with instructor.
